current_external_evidence: No HTTP auth is enforced on /mcp; tools rely on caller context and allowlists.
target_design: Backend JWT auth + current-user checks before any RAG endpoint or adapter call.
notes: Contract requires auth at the future backend-owned endpoint layer.

current_external_evidence: Write tools require admin_mode and adminProfiles in the external service.
target_design: FastAPI role gating for search vs ingest vs audit.
notes: External service has tool-level guards, but backend RBAC still needs to own the final surface.

current_external_evidence: No explicit MCP rate limiter was found.
target_design: Backend rate limit by user/session and by operation class.
notes: Search and writes should have separate budgets.

current_external_evidence: repository.recordQuery and repository.recordAuditEvent are implemented.
target_design: Persist backend audit entries for search, document reads, ingests, writes, and denials.
notes: Good foundation, but backend-owned audit still needs the final API layer.

current_external_evidence: Only ENS-first tools are registered; legacy multi-tenant tool names are intentionally omitted.
target_design: Hardcoded server-side mapping from backend endpoints to MCP tools.
notes: Do not expose raw tool invocation to the frontend.

current_external_evidence: zod schemas are defined for each tool input.
target_design: Pydantic/DTO validation on backend request payloads.
notes: Input validation is explicit in the external service.

current_external_evidence: Outputs are wrapped via jsonToolResult/errorToolResult, but no explicit redaction layer is present.
target_design: Sanitize/trim errors and document fields before returning to clients.
notes: Should prevent leaking paths, raw provider responses, or internal IDs beyond contract.

current_external_evidence: OPENAI_API_KEY and Supabase service role stay in env; no frontend prefix is used.
target_design: Backend-only provider keys with no VITE_* exposure.
notes: Key ownership remains server-side.

current_external_evidence: Current design keeps Hermes/ENS RAG behind server-owned APIs.
target_design: Frontend only calls /api/v1/rag or /api/v1/ai-chat.
notes: This is a hard boundary for Apoema.

current_external_evidence: collectionSchema and normalizeCollections enforce the 4 ENS collections.
target_design: Backend should reject any collection outside the allowlist.
notes: Allowlist is explicit in the external service.

current_external_evidence: Write tools are gated to admin profiles; read tools remain tenant-scoped.
target_design: Backend should gate mutations by role and endpoint class.
notes: Need backend enforcement in the future adapter.

current_external_evidence: get_document enforces tenant=ens and collection matches expected value.
target_design: Backend should ensure document ownership before returning content.
notes: Good pattern to preserve.

current_external_evidence: TenantPolicyConfig and resolveTenantScope limit operations to the ENS tenant.
target_design: Backend should preserve tenant isolation and never widen to arbitrary tenants.
notes: Current external service hardcodes ENS tenant scope.

current_external_evidence: ens_rag_ingest_* tools require admin_mode and an admin profile.
target_design: Backend should keep ingest endpoints admin-only.
notes: This is the correct default.

current_external_evidence: ens_rag_save_marketing_memory requires user_validated + validation_note.
target_design: Require explicit user approval before persisting memory writes.
notes: This is the main guardrail for memory writes.

current_external_evidence: No explicit prompt-injection annotation or defense layer was found.
target_design: Document prompt-injection risk and sanitize retrieval prompts server-side.
notes: Important for future chat-bridge integration.

current_external_evidence: Search input is validated; backend should also cap prompt/query size.
target_design: Bound query length and payload size before calling MCP tools.
notes: Current service validates schema but not a dedicated query-length guard.

current_external_evidence: limit defaults exist and backend clamps result counts.
target_design: Cap the number of returned docs/chunks and trim large payloads.
notes: Keep search responses bounded.

current_external_evidence: No explicit per-tool timeout configuration was found in the source inventory.
target_design: Backend adapter should enforce request and upstream timeouts.
notes: Timeouts are required for a safe adapter.

current_external_evidence: Errors are converted to JSON tool errors, but details may still be text-only.
target_design: Return stable error codes/messages from backend routes.
notes: Keep failures machine-readable.

current_external_evidence: Audit events, query logging, and console logs exist.
target_design: Add metrics/traces at the backend adapter boundary.
notes: Useful for tracing future RAG calls.
